name: VCBVmem
description: Extends the Virtual Circuit Board VMem address space from 20-bit (1,048,576 words) to 21-bit (2,097,152 words). This is the confirmed maximum the closed vcb.exe native engine supports without crashing. With default latch spacing, only 20 bits fit on the 2048x2048 board; to use the 21st bit, reduce the latch Offset in VMem Settings or pair with the Board Size Modifier mod. Pure GDScript, loads at runtime, never replaces vcb.pck; coexists with other mods.
